input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.3.1
            TITLE: the maximum power measured by the energy meter must not exceed 80 kw

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.3.1: The maximum power measured by the Energy Meter must not exceed 80 kW
EV.3.3.1 The maximum power measured by the Energy Meter must not exceed 80 kW
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 90 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The maximum power measured by the Energy Meter must not exceed 80 kW
